# Gradle Wrapper

This directory contains the Gradle wrapper files used to build the project.

## Files

- `gradle-wrapper.properties`: Configuration file for the Gradle wrapper
- `gradle-wrapper.jar`: JAR file that bootstraps the Gradle build process

## Usage

The Gradle wrapper is automatically used when you run `./gradlew` (Linux/macOS) or `gradlew.bat` (Windows).

For online build services, these files ensure consistent Gradle version usage.
